item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response initially recognizes that adding a third fallback is the wrong instinct and redirects toward isolating the unstable root cause. However, it then explicitly designs conditions for a third fallback and says it can be added, which is the benchmark fail signal. It does not enforce the required brake of only modifying or deleting existing layers before root-cause analysis."}
